All-in-one solution for
your Hotel

From online booking to check-out, Odoo brings every part of your hotel operations into one seamless system.

Start now
Meet an advisor
  • Micro Business (1-5 employees)
  • Small Business (6-50 employees)
  • Midsized company (51-250 employees)
  • Micro entreprise (1-5 employés) - Français
  • Petite entreprise (6-50 employés) - Français
  • Empresas Pequeñas (<50 empleados) - Español
  • Large company (250+ employees)

With Odoo, I can monitor all restaurant and hotel results in real time. I can also review costs, the balance sheet, and the income statement, while maintaining full control over forecasts and budget management.

Nastasja Roberto
Director of D'Braustuff and the Brauhotel

Website ready for bookings

Create a website using Odoo's AI-based builder, 3+ million free photos, drag-and-drop elements, and SEO optimization tools. No coding skills required.

List your availabilities, details of each room, and allow clients to make reservations online.

Your domain is free for one year with Odoo!

Save time, maximize bookings

Manage your planning easily. Bookings, modifications, room upgrades, and additional options. All this is directly linked to your invoicing for a great follow-up.

Guest-centric operations

An effortless check-in and check-out system ensures you can focus on making your guests feel truly welcome.

Include additional services such as breakfast or activities, and collect tourist tax. You can also track guests' ID information if your country requires it.

Tracking finances has never been this easy!

Flexible invoicing

Generate professional invoices in one click, and accept various payment methods.

But wait! There's more.

All the features
done right.

Online booking management

Build your website in a flash, showcase your rooms, and accept online bookings and payments.

City tax

Collect tourist taxes as you check out your guests and keep track of their details.

Streamlined planning

Manage all bookings from a centralized app, handle room upgrades, rescheduling, and maintenance work.

Integrated sales and rental

Offer additional services such as breakfast, manage rentals, and enjoy the smoothness of integrated sales processes.

Flexible invoicing

Create detailed invoices, and allow customers to access them via email or QR code.

Payment providers

Choose from the biggest names in credit card payment providers like Adyen, Stripe, PayPal, and more. Odoo does not charge any extra: 0%

One need, one app.

Expand as you grow.

Odoo is a suite of open source business apps that cover all your company needs: CRM, eCommerce, accounting, inventory, point of sale, project management, etc.

Odoo's unique value proposition is to be at the same time very easy to use and fully integrated.
